name: Gladstone Commercial Corporation 6.00% Series G Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock par value $0.001 per share
summary: Gladstone Commercial Corporation 6.00% Series G Cumulative Redeemable Preferred Stock is a preferred stock issued by Gladstone Commercial Corporation, a real estate investment trust (REIT). This preferred stock offers a fixed dividend rate and has preference over common stock in terms of dividend payments and asset distribution. Gladstone Commercial Corporation is headquartered in McLean, Virginia.
